about.title: About the Creator
about.name: Souhib TRABELSI
about.bio: Software engineer with more than 6 years of experience specializing in backend development with Python (FastAPI, Flask), React, and cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP). Experienced across the full software lifecycle — from frontend to deployment on cloud and on-premise infrastructures. Passionate about clean architecture, real-time apps, and building technology for the Islamic community.
about.projectDescription: IPG (Islamic Party Games) is a real-time multiplayer platform featuring Islamized versions of popular party games like Undercover and Codenames. Built with FastAPI, Socket.IO, React, and Redis for a seamless gaming experience.
about.educationEpitech: Epitech Paris — Master's in Software Engineering
about.experienceMaduraTitle: Madura Capital Management — Python Developer / DevOps
about.experienceMaduraDesc: Development of internal tools and automation systems to streamline trading operations and data flows within the hedge fund. Built data feeders, Prefect ETL pipelines, and a React TypeScript interface for trade management. Designed a clean FastAPI backend with CI/CD pipelines.
about.experienceSnapDesc: Development and deployment of a dashboard for Snaplab team members to record user sessions during tests of Snap's Connected Spectacles. Built backend with FastAPI, deployed on AWS ECS with Terraform, and created a React TypeScript frontend on AWS Amplify.
about.experienceEnedisDesc: Development and deployment of a platform allowing users to follow up on their Enedis requests and exchange via chat. Built with FastAPI, deployed on AWS Lambda with Serverless framework, and React TypeScript frontend on AWS Amplify.
about.experienceBnpTitle: BNP Paribas Personal Finance — Python Developer / DevOps
about.experienceBnpDesc: Transitioned monolithic architecture to microservices. Created and deployed Python APIs enabling data scientists to run IDEs connected to a NAS for accessing large volumes of sensitive data inside protected infrastructures.
about.experienceCloudeasierDesc: Developed solutions enabling companies to reduce Cloud infrastructure costs. Built Python scripts on AWS Lambda and GCP Cloud Functions for compute instance pricing and scheduling, deployed via Terraform.
about.mentoringText: With my experience I can help CS engineers, developers, or anyone who wants to learn more about computer science — freely. Contact me via email or phone. If I don't answer, leave a message and I'll call you back.
